articles.title: Masconomet school officials did not adequately respond to harassment claims, student athlete says
articles.description:
"As the only girl on the varsity golf team, I was bullied and humiliated, rather than treated as a teammate," freshman Charlotte Rollins told the Masconomet School Committee.

The post Masconomet school officials did not adequately respond to harassment claims, student athlete says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Freshman Charlotte Rollins reported bullying on the varsity golf team to the Masconomet School Committee.
Rollins, the only girl on the team, felt humiliated instead of supported by teammates.
Inadequate response from school officials raises concerns about student safety and inclusivity.

articles.title: Report: Mass. drivers have paid more than $1 billion extra at the pump since the Iran war began
articles.description:
A new U.S. Congress Joint Economic Committee analysis finds fuel costs surged for state motorists and home heating after the conflict started in late February.

The post Report: Mass. drivers have paid more than $1 billion extra at the pump since the Iran war began appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts drivers paid over $1 billion extra for fuel since late February 2023.
Fuel costs surged significantly due to the ongoing Iran conflict, affecting local motorists.
Increased fuel prices also impact home heating costs for Boston residents this winter.

articles.title: Mass. campgrounds still have availability for World Cup fans
articles.description:
Soccer fans can book glamping accommodations.

The post Mass. campgrounds still have availability for World Cup fans appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts campgrounds offer glamping options for World Cup fans visiting in 2026.
Several campgrounds still have availability for bookings during the tournament dates.
Local businesses expect increased tourism revenue from soccer fans staying at these sites.

articles.title: This stroke survivor is running Boston for Spaulding Rehabilitation Hospital
articles.description:
"Spaulding wrapped their arms around me and gave me the strength to rebuild my life. I can never truly repay what they’ve given me, but I can do something to give back."

The post This stroke survivor is running Boston for Spaulding Rehabilitation Hospital appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tim Rafferty, a stroke survivor, is running the Boston Marathon to support Spaulding Rehabilitation Hospital.
Rafferty credits Spaulding for helping him rebuild his life after his stroke.
His run aims to raise awareness and funds for local rehabilitation services in Boston.

articles.title: ‘I appreciated that’: Jayson Tatum credited Knicks fans’ applause in MSG return
articles.description:
"This was a big moment for me."

The post ‘I appreciated that’: Jayson Tatum credited Knicks fans’ applause in MSG return appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jayson Tatum received applause from Knicks fans during his return to Madison Square Garden.
Tatum expressed gratitude for the support, highlighting the significance of the moment.
This interaction may enhance Boston fans' appreciation for Tatum's sportsmanship and character.
